privileged_info_summary: The paint inventory calculator task uses verified real-world standards: 375 sq ft/gallon coverage (industry standard middle ground), 20 sq ft door deductions (7ft×3ft standard), 15 sq ft window deductions (standard), 8-foot default ceiling height (National Building Code standard), 2-coat painting standard (professional requirement), and reasonable paint pricing between $28-38/gallon consistent with 2026 interior paint market (mid-range $30-45/gallon, budget-friendly to premium). 7% sales tax is at the upper end of typical US rates (6.44% average) but reasonable. All task parameters (240-second timeout, 30 max steps, medium difficulty) are appropriate for the complexity level. Data is completely synthetic, generated within the task setup script.
